summary: Discovery signals suggest ProductOS should research trust and provenance requirements before expanding automation scope.
key_points: Customer pain on manual status work is corroborated across research, app reviews, and leadership conversations.
Trust and explainability are emerging as adoption gates for AI-generated PM outputs.
Research should clarify which segments need explicit evidence traceability on day one.
pending_questions: Which buyer segments require inspectable provenance before adopting automation?
What level of source coverage is sufficient for PMs to trust generated outputs?
